title: Senior Engineering Manager & Site Lead (Buenos Aires, Argentina)
description:
At Lendbuzz, we believe financial opportunity should be more personalized and fair. We develop innovative technologies that provide underserved and overlooked borrowers with better access to credit. While our core operations are based in the United States, we are excited to be setting up our presence in Argentina as we continue to grow globally. From our employees to our dealers, partners, and borrowers, we’ve built a company and a culture around a resolute belief in the promise and power of diversity. We value independent and critical thinking \- and we’re looking forward to building a strong local team in Argentina to support our mission.
   

  

 Lendbuzz is expanding its global engineering footprint with a new site in Buenos Aires, Argentina. We are seeking a Senior Engineering Manager \& Site Lead to be the first hire for this new location. This leader will play a dual role: (1\) guiding a team of engineers to build critical functionality for Lendbuzz’s platform, and (2\) serving as the site lead, responsible for scaling the office and shaping its culture.
   

  

 This role is ideal for a technical leader who can code, review, and architect alongside their team while also inspiring, mentoring, and building an engineering organization from the ground up. As the site grows through 2026 and beyond, the Site Lead will have the opportunity to evolve into a senior leadership position with broader organizational responsibilities.
   

  

 Growth Opportunity
   

  

 As the Buenos Aires office expands, this role will grow its span of control with responsibility for multiple teams and functions. The right candidate will help shape the strategic direction of Lendbuzz’s engineering presence in Argentina and become a cornerstone of our global technology leadership.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Technical Leadership: Lead and mentor a team of engineers, fostering technical excellence and delivering high\-quality, scalable software
* Collaboration: Work closely with Product Designers, Product Managers, and Software Engineers in the U.S. and globally to design and deliver compelling user\-facing products
* Site Leadership: Serve as the leader for the Buenos Aires engineering office—building culture, attracting top talent, and establishing the site as a core part of Lendbuzz’s global engineering organization
* Operational Excellence: Drive software development best practices, including code reviews, testing strategies, and production monitoring to ensure reliability and quality
* Scaling: Partner with global engineering leadership to grow the site from the initial 5 engineers into a larger, multi\-functional team that includes QA and analysts
* Inspiration \& Influence: Be a leader that people want to follow, setting the tone for technical rigor, ownership, and collaborative culture


**Key Requirements:**
* 10\+ years of software engineering experience, including significant hands\-on development in SaaS or fintech environments
* 5\+ years in engineering management, with proven success mentoring teams and delivering complex projects
* Strong technical expertise across modern software development practices and tools; ability to dive deep into code and architecture when needed
* Experience in leading cross\-functional, globally distributed teams
* Excellent leadership, communication, and organizational skills—able to inspire both engineers and cross\-functional partners
* Experience in React, Node.js, and TypeScript, RESTful APIs, full\-stack development
* Experience in developing mobile application
* Proficiency in Ruby is beneficial, with additional value placed on familiarity with Next.js and Nest.js
* Experience in Python development
* Skilled in debugging, optimization, and unit/integration testing
* Experience with Linux, Bash, and Docker
* Fluency in English (written and verbal) to collaborate effectively with U.S. leadership and global teams


**Nice\-to\-Have:**
* Prior experience launching or scaling a new engineering office or site
* Background in fintech, automotive, or financial services platforms
* Strong local network in Buenos Aires tech talent market


 We believe:
   

  

**Diversity is a competitive advantage** 
 . We celebrate our differences, and are better when we have a variety of experiences, viewpoints, and backgrounds.
   

  

**Compassion is a strength.** 
 We care about our customers and look to build long\-term relationships with them.
   

  

**Simplicity is a key feature** 
 . We work hard to make our forms and processes as painless and intuitive as possible.
   

  

**Honesty and transparency are non negotiable** 
 . We incorporate these traits in all of our interactions.
   

  

**Financial opportunity belongs to everyone** 
 . We work every day to improve lives by extending this opportunity.
   

  

 If you believe these things too then we would love to hear from you!

title: Senior Project Manager (temporary)
description:
Please note that we will never request payment or bank account information at any stage of the recruitment process. As we continue to grow our teams, we urge you to be cautious of fraudulent job postings or recruitment activities that misuse our company name and information. Please protect your personal information during any recruitment process. While Monks may contact potential candidates via LinkedIn, all applications must be submitted through our official website (monks.com/careers).
   

  

**Job Description:** 
 We are seeking a detail\-oriented and highly organized independent professional for a temporary Sr. Producer role within Monks (2 months). You will play a vital role in ensuring the smooth execution of various campaigns including the production of various digital assets. Your primary focus will be managing the team within MediaMonks to produce the work as well as the client\-facing lead. Our ideal candidate is a fast and flexible go\-getter who jumps on new opportunities, with a natural aptitude for collaboration.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the execution of a high volume of mid\-funnel and on\-site assets, including static digital, DOOH, OOH, and OLVs, with the creative and production team at MediaMonks.
* Establish project timelines, deliverables, and resource allocation to align with campaign goals and objectives.
* Create and manage project schedules, milestones, and budgets for timely and cost\-effective delivery of creative assets.
* Partner closely with client teams to coordinate the review and approval process for creative assets, ensuring brand compliance and obtaining necessary approvals.
* Monitor project progress, identify potential risks, and implement appropriate mitigation strategies for successful project completion.
* Lead production efforts to ensure timely and expectations\-exceeding delivery.
* Bring in\-house talent together and ensure high\-quality work.
* Scope and quote projects, as well as plan production work with realistic targets and deadlines.
* Manage the end\-to\-end project life cycle from client briefing to delivery.
* Proactively communicate updates on changing project priorities, timelines, and deliverables across teams.
* Plan ahead and manage resources efficiently on a day\-to\-day and hour\-to\-hour basis.
* Act as a taskmaster, defining and communicating milestones across teams.
* Provide quality control and review deliverables prepared by the team.
* Manage the trafficking of creative for client review and feedback.
* Track project changes and their impact on cost and timeframe.
* Review project hours burn reports for accuracy and risks.
* Support strategies for risk mitigation and contingency planning.
* Ensure project documents are complete, current, and stored appropriately.
* Serve as the main lead client point\-of\-contact on all projects.
* Collaborate with Account Management to escalate client issues and mitigate risk.
* Provide guidance, training, and support to the creative team for their success.
* Ensure stakeholder satisfaction and evaluate project performance with the support of Account Management.


**Qualifications**
* Strong understanding and experience in mass brand advertising campaigns across various mediums.
* Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously and meet tight deadlines.
* Keen attention to detail and a focus on delivering high\-quality creative assets while ensuring brand compliance.
* Comfortable managing a wide range of projects across different time zones.
* In\-depth knowledge of the digital advertising and production industry, understanding the current needs of agencies and brands.
* Ability to develop client relationships and work\-streams that extend beyond individual projects.
* Quick learner and driven to succeed, with a natural ability to motivate and collaborate with people globally.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for building strong relationships with internal and external teams.
* Proficiency in project management tools and software for tracking project progress, timelines, and budgets.
* Independent and proactive worker, taking ownership of projects and driving them to successful completion.
* Hands\-on experience producing high\-end work and a deep understanding of the creative process.
* Experienced in engaging new projects, managing business relationships, and developing partnerships.
* Ability to handle high\-stakes accounts and propose strategic next steps.
* Understanding of digital business objectives and the ability to quickly grasp project challenges and goals.
* Demonstrated ability to efficiently handle multiple projects in a fast\-paced environment while delivering outstanding results.
* Strong written communication skills and attention to detail.
* Exceptional organizational skills, thriving in a fast\-paced environment.
* Confident in communicating with individuals at all levels within the organization.
* Ability to prioritize workload effectively and meet deadlines with minimal supervision.
* Proactive and positive attitude is essential.
* Digital experience is a requirement; candidates with solely entertainment or film backgrounds will not be considered.
* Nice to have: Strong knowledge of Figma


**About Monks**
 Monks is the global, purely digital, unitary operating brand of S4Capital plc. With a legacy of innovation and specialized expertise, Monks combines an extraordinary range of global marketing and technology services to accelerate business possibilities and redefine how brands and businesses interact with the world. Its integration of systems and workflows delivers unfettered content production, scaled experiences, enterprise\-grade technology and data science fueled by AI—managed by the industry’s best and most diverse digital talent—to help the world’s trailblazing companies outmaneuver and outpace their competition.
   

  

 Monks was named a Contender in The Forrester Wave™: Global Marketing Services. It has remained a constant presence on Adweek’s Fastest Growing lists (2019\-23\), ranks among Cannes Lions' Top 10 Creative Companies (2022\-23\) and is the only partner to have been placed in AdExchanger’s Programmatic Power Players list every year (2020\-24\). In addition to being named Adweek’s first AI Agency of the Year (2023\), Monks has been recognized by Business Intelligence in its 2024 Excellence in Artificial Intelligence Awards program in three categories: the Individual category, Organizational Winner in AI Strategic Planning and AI Product for its service Monks.Flow. Monks has also garnered the title of Webby Production Company of the Year (2021\-24\), won a record number of FWAs and has earned a spot on Newsweek’s Top 100 Global Most Loved Workplaces 2023\.
   

  

 We are an equal\-opportunity employer committed to building a respectful and empowering work environment for all people to freely express themselves amongst colleagues who embrace diversity in all respects. Including fresh voices and unique points of view in all aspects of our business not only creates an environment where we can all grow and thrive but also increases our potential to produce work that better represents—and resonates with—the world around us.
